name: ai-data-copilot
description: AI-native agentic data analysis team with autonomous SQL generation, code execution, RAG knowledge retrieval, and multi-source data insight capabilities

displayDescription.en: A 6-member AI-native data analysis team with natural language to SQL, Python data science, RAG knowledge QA, interactive dashboards, and professional report generation.
displayDescription.zh: 6人AI数据分析团队，擅长自然语言转SQL、Python建模、RAG知识问答、仪表盘可视化与报告生成

defaultInitPrompt.zh: 分析这个CSV文件，生成一份包含关键指标和可视化图表的数据画像报告
defaultInitPrompt.en: Analyze this CSV file and generate a profiling report with key metrics and visualizations

quickPrompts.en: Analyze this CSV file and generate a profiling report with key metrics and visualizations
quickPrompts.zh: 分析这个CSV文件，生成一份包含关键指标和可视化图表的数据画像报告

quickPrompts.en: Connect to my database and write SQL to answer: what are the top 10 customers by revenue this quarter?
quickPrompts.zh: 连接我的数据库，用SQL回答：本季度营收前10的客户是哪些？

quickPrompts.en: Read the uploaded documents and create a knowledge-based analysis report with data-driven insights
quickPrompts.zh: 阅读上传的文档，结合数据驱动的洞察生成一份知识分析报告
